summary: Fixed 3 merge gaps in create_change_merge / merge_git_ops workflow.
description: Fix 1: capture_head_sha() runs git rev-parse HEAD on project_root after step 3 merge. Fix 2: create_pr() called before merge_worktree_branch when auto_pr=true+worktree. Fix 3: close_issue_if_exists scans all open issues by frontmatter id. All 1394 tests pass.
